title: Method Level 4
summary: G major and D major scales, two-sharp key, syncopated rhythms, broken chords, and waltz in G to bridge into late-beginner reading.

exercises.title: G Scale RH Full Octave
exercises.summary: Right hand G major scale across a full octave with F-sharp.
exercises.goal: Read and play all eight notes of G major evenly, noting the F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Scale LH Full Octave
exercises.summary: Left hand G major scale across a full octave in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Read and play G major in bass clef with an accurate F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Major Five-Finger RH
exercises.summary: Right hand D major five-finger pattern with F-sharp and C-sharp.
exercises.goal: Play D major with accurate F-sharp and C-sharp in the right hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Major Five-Finger LH
exercises.summary: Left hand D major five-finger pattern in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Navigate D major with sharps in the left hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Syncopated Rhythm Study
exercises.summary: A melody using the quarter–eighth–eighth–quarter–quarter syncopation pattern.
exercises.goal: Feel and play the off-beat push of a syncopated rhythm.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Eighth-Note Étude
exercises.summary: Ascending and descending C major through an extended range in eighth notes.
exercises.goal: Keep eighth notes even across register shifts in an extended scale passage.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Arpeggio Pattern LH
exercises.summary: Left hand broken-chord pattern spanning C and G bass positions.
exercises.goal: Play a flowing arpeggiated bass line in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Major Melody
exercises.summary: An extended melody in G major spanning a full octave.
exercises.goal: Play a flowing G major melody with accurate F-sharps throughout.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Waltz in G Major
exercises.summary: A flowing waltz melody in G major with F-sharp colour.
exercises.goal: Play G major in three-four time with a graceful waltz phrasing.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Minor Melody
exercises.summary: A melody in D natural minor with expressive B-flat colour.
exercises.goal: Feel the D minor sound across a phrase with an accurate B-flat.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Eighth-Note Syncopation
exercises.summary: Off-beat eighth-note patterns creating a lively syncopated effect.
exercises.goal: Accurately place eighth notes between the beats without rushing.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Major Broken Chord Melody
exercises.summary: A melody built from ascending and descending G major triad arpeggios.
exercises.goal: Connect the triad tones into one smooth melodic arc.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Register Leap Melody
exercises.summary: Wide leaps between registers demanding quick visual scanning.
exercises.goal: Read and play large leaps without hesitation across two octaves.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Level Four Review
exercises.summary: A review phrase drawing on D major, sharps, and mixed rhythms.
exercises.goal: Apply Level 4 skills: two-sharp key, syncopation, and wide range.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Level Four Finale
exercises.summary: A complete melody combining G major, syncopation, and wide leaps.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate Level 4 fluency: sharp key, rhythmic variety, and range.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
